about.title: About Sandlabs
about.subtitle: Open source, self-custody, and accessibility for Bitcoin users.

manifesto.title: Manifesto
manifesto.paragraph_1: I am a hardware engineer focused on bringing sovereignty to users through Bitcoin. My projects prioritize transparency, portability, and fair pricing so more people can build their own digital security.
manifesto.paragraph_2: The goal is clear: open hardware from end to end, from manufacturing to firmware, with simple documentation and a practical experience for people who want to start today.

what.title: What I do
items: Jade DIY — open-source hardware wallet produced in Brazil.
3D printing — custom cases, boxes, and parts.
NerdMiner and related — support for production and maintenance.
Tutorials — step-by-step guides to build your own setup.

x.title: Twitter / X
x.text: Behind the scenes, updates, and quick tips.

terms.title: Terms
terms.subtitle: A short summary of payment, shipping, and privacy conditions.

payments.title: Payments
items: Lightning payments are generated on demand during checkout.
Orders only move into processing after payment confirmation.
Fiat-denominated prices may vary in sats according to the current BTC exchange rate.

shipping.title: Shipping and privacy
items: Shipping is calculated based on destination country and total order weight.
Shipping data is stored with encryption at rest.
We only collect the data required to deliver the order and provide support.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Choose the most direct channel to ask questions, build an order, or follow updates.

whatsapp.text: Fast channel for quotes, shipping, and purchase questions.

telegram.text: Direct contact for technical questions and follow-up.
